title: Phase 1 Inventory Row
description: Advisory row-level contract for phase1_inventory.csv. Missing or uncertain metadata should be left blank, null, or marked in notes rather than fabricated.

section.description: Source section or high-level domain bucket.

application_tag.description: Task, application, benchmark, or domain tag.

reading_batch.description: Assigned reading batch. Prefer B01, B02, ... when known.

arxiv_id.description: Normalized arXiv ID. May be blank or uncertain when not verified.

first_submitted.description: First arXiv submission date when available.

latest_version_date.description: Latest arXiv version date when available.

source_url.description: Original source webpage or local source reference.

notes.description: Uncertainty, duplicate relation, non-arXiv status, or manual verification need.

classification_confidence.description: Optional classification confidence. May be label or numeric.

classification_source.description: How the classification was produced, such as source heading, rules, or manual review.
